steps.title: Find the sample proportion
steps.content:
In the sample, $9$ out of $60$ people named mango:
$$\frac{9}{60}=0.15$$

steps.title: Apply it to the town
steps.content:
Multiply the town population by the sample proportion:
$$0.15(16{,}240)=2{,}436$$
This estimate is closest to $2{,}400$. The answer is B.
